Rows.IDAComment: who (sub_5740DF @0x5740df Omok / sub_5380C8 @0x5380c8 MemoryGame): turn passes to this slot and sets the 30000ms move timer (this[678]=30000) — the SKIP/turn-advance arm, mode 56, distinct from RESULT(55) which updates the win-loss record. No result strings.

Rows.Note: atlas: trailing padding byte — client stops reading (harmless over-write)
